title: chengiodendron marginatum
intro: Chengiodendron marginatum, also known as the Chinese box holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ebenaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Chengiodendron marginatum include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and improving cardiovascular health, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicine for various health conditions.
